description: Former South African captain Faf du Plessis lauded Gautam Gambhir's leadership, calling him a 'villain' for rivals but a respected figure for his team.  Du Plessis highlighted Gambhir's high standards and accountability, evident in his successful stints with KKR and India's recent limited-overs triumphs, despite Test match struggles.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 8: Ranveer Singh film eyes 'Dhurandhar 1' record of Rs 840
description: As Aditya Dhar’s espionage masterpiece Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge enters its eighth day on Thursday, March 26, 2026, the Ranveer Singh starrer is rewriting the history of Indian cinema. Having already shattered the Rs. 1,000 crore worldwide milestone in record time, the film is now tracking at nearly double the efficiency of previous blockbusters like 'Jawan', 'Pathaan', and 'Animal.' Despite its sprawling 3-hour and 49-minute runtime, the sequel's domestic net collection has surged to more than Rs. 630 crore, fueled by unprecedented demand for midnight screenings and a gripping narrative that sees Jaskirat Singh Rangi, played by Ranveer Singh deeper than ever into the Karachi underworld as Hamza Ali Mazari.

description: The Middle East war has intensified an oil crisis as Iran's actions in the Strait of Hormuz disrupt global energy supplies.  While the Red Sea's Bab el-Mandeb Strait is considered an alternative, it also faces threats. Reopening Hormuz is complicated by its geography and requires significant security measures, including a multinational coalition, to overcome the risks of attacks and minefields.

description: Global energy market tensions, particularly concerning the Strait of Hormuz, have highlighted the vulnerabilities of LPG supply to India. description: Microsoft's Chief People Officer Amy Coleman announced a significant HR restructuring, prioritizing adaptability and speed for the AI era. This shakeup includes leadership changes and new teams focused on accelerating HR operations, employee experience, and workforce skilling. The move signals a shift towards agility and a faster pace for the tech giant.

title: Man ends life after apology video at police station goes viral
description: A man died by suicide in Rajasthan's Balotra district, with his family alleging harassment by usurers. The creditors reportedly recorded and viralized an apology video of the deceased on police station premises, despite a consensus on repayment being reached. Two accused have been detained.
